title: Danny Phantom Heropack
body:
is a 1.20.1 Mod Addon that adds Danny Phantom's powers from the show to your world
with this addon, you will able to walk through walls, disappear, and fly
 you will need a mod called Palladium made by Lucraft in order to use this addon pack.
to get the powers you need to craft a mini ghost portal and a hazmat suit 
while standing next to ghost portal hold a quartz circuit in your offhand
